description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy, using the default image kwant/testing. In the build stage define the build package job (runs `echo -e "[DEFAULT]\ndefine_macros = CYTHON_TRACE=1" >build.conf`, then `./setup.py build` and `./setup.py build_ext -i`, stores all files as untracked artifacts for 1 hour), the check whitespace style job (runs `./check_whitespace` and allows failure), and two conda jobs that use the image condaforge/linux-anvil: `build and upload conda package` (runs sudo yum install devtoolset‑2‑gcc‑gfortran, clones the conda‑recipes repo, adds the kwant channel, builds kwant‑dev for Python 3.5 and 3.6, moves the resulting tar.bz2 files and optionally uploads them with an Anaconda token; runs only on the master branch) and `build and upload conda package (manual)` (same script, runs on all other branches and is manual). In the test stage add `build PDF documentation` (installs sympy and matplotlib, runs `make -C doc latex SPHINXOPTS='-n -W'`, changes to the latex directory and runs `make all-pdf`; artifacts: kwant.pdf for 1 month), `build documentation` (installs matplotlib, cleans and builds HTML with Sphinx options including website_deploy, sets REFNAME and SOURCE_URL; artifacts: doc/build/html/ for 1 month), `run tests` (executes `py.test -r w --cov=kwant --cov-report term --cov-report html --flakes kwant`; artifacts: htmlcov), `check for broken links in doc` (runs `make -C doc linkcheck`, allow_failure), `check for dependencies installed` (conditional echo if .eggs exists, allow_failure), and `check for broken links in doc` (runs `make -C doc linkcheck`). In the deploy stage define `upload coverage` (moves htmlcov to a slug and rsyncs to the coverage server, defines a coverage environment with on_stop remove_coverage and URL https://kwant-project.org/coverage/; uses SSH key from MASTER_WEBSITE_KEY and IGNORE_HOSTKEY), `upload dev version docs` (rsyncs built HTML to doc/dev on master, production environment URL https://kwant-project.org/doc/dev), `upload docs of tagged build` (runs on tags matching vX.Y.Z, rsyncs HTML to a versioned doc path derived from the tag, production environment), `upload documentation to the test server` (runs on branch pipelines, rsyncs HTML to the test server, defines a docs review environment with on_stop remove_docs and URL https://test.kwant-project.org/doc/), and the manual cleanup jobs `remove_coverage` and `remove_docs` (both stop their respective environments and delete the SSH key after use). All remote‑deployment jobs use the IGNORE_HOSTKEY variable to suppress host key checking and SSH keys provided via CI variables.
